name: Mark Wahlberg

acts.description: At 16: two racist hate crime attacks on Vietnamese men, blinding one in one eye and attacking another while using slurs

behavior_summary: At 16, committed two violent hate crime attacks on Vietnamese men, permanently blinding one. Served 45 days of a 2-year sentence. Applied for a pardon in 2014; application was withdrawn.

art.summary: Major Hollywood action star with genuine dramatic range. Boogie Nights is his best work by a large margin.

verdict.blurb: Blinded a man in a hate crime at 16, served 45 days, and went on to become one of Hollywood's highest paid actors. His victim still can't see out of that eye.
